testcase.name: test_admin_login[chromium]

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("input[placeholder='Email']")

testcase.failure:
self = <test_e2e.TestBankingE2E object at 0x0000018A3935EE40>, page = <Page url='http://localhost:8501/'>
def test_admin_login(self, page: Page): page.goto(BASE_URL) # Wait for the main container page.wait_for_selector("div[data-testid='stAppViewBlockContainer']", timeout=15000)
# Fill login form – use exact placeholder text > page.fill("input[placeholder='Email']", "admin@banking.com")

async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False, title: str = None ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr( task, "__pw_stack__", None ) or inspect.stack(0)
parsed_st = _extract_stack_trace_information_from_stack(st, is_internal, title) self._api_zone.set(parsed_st) try: return await cb() except Exception as error: > raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for locator("input[placeholder='Email']")

self = <test_e2e.TestBankingE2E object at 0x0000018A39880C20>, page = <Page url='http://localhost:8501/'>
def test_money_transfer_flow(self, page: Page): # Login first page.goto(BASE_URL) page.wait_for_selector("div[data-testid='stAppViewBlockContainer']", timeout=15000) > page.fill("input[placeholder='Email']", "admin@banking.com")
tests\system\test_e2e.py:70: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ..\..\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\playwright\sync_api\_generated.py:10520: in fill self._sync( ..\..\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_page.py:905: in fill return await self._main_frame.fill(**locals_to_params(locals())) ..\..\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_frame.py:607: in fill await self._fill(**locals_to_params(locals())) ..\..\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_frame.py:619: in _fill await self._channel.send("fill", self._timeout, locals_to_params(locals())) ..\..\anaconda3\Lib\site-packages\playwright\_impl\_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <playwright._impl._connection.Connection object at 0x0000018A39883E30>, cb = <function Channel.send.<locals>.<lambda> at 0x0000018A39A4AAC0>, is_internal = False, title = None
async def wrap_api_call( self, cb: Callable[[], Any], is_internal: bool = False, title: str = None ) -> Any: if self._api_zone.get(): return await cb() task = asyncio.current_task(self._loop) st: List[inspect.FrameInfo] = getattr( task, "__pw_stack__", None ) or inspect.stack(0)
parsed_st = _extract_stack_trace_information_from_stack(st, is_internal, title) self._api_zone.set(parsed_st) try: return await cb() except Exception as error: > raise rewrite_error(error, f"{parsed_st['apiName']}: {error}") from None E playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Page.fill: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. E Call log: E - waiting for locator("input[placeholder='Email']")
